paper_metadata.title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper demonstrates that multilingual denoising pre-training produces significant performance gains across a wide variety of machine translation (MT) tasks. We present mBART -- a sequence-to-sequence denoising auto-encoder pre-trained on large-scale monolingual corpora in many languages using the BART objective. mBART is one of the first methods for pre-training a complete sequence-to-sequence model by denoising full texts in multiple languages, while previous approaches have focused only on the encoder, decoder, or reconstructing parts of the text. Pre-training a complete model allows it to be directly fine tuned for supervised (both sentence-level and document-level) and unsupervised machine translation, with no task-specific modifications. We demonstrate that adding mBART initialization produces performance gains in all but the highest-resource settings, including up to 12 BLEU points for low resource MT and over 5 BLEU points for many document-level and unsupervised models. We also show it also enables new types of transfer to language pairs with no bi-text or that were not in the pre-training corpus, and present extensive analysis of which factors contribute the most to effective pre-training.

extraction_data.innovation: Multilingual denoising pre-training of a complete sequence-to-sequence model on a diverse corpus of 25 languages, enabling zero-shot transfer to machine translation tasks without task-specific modifications.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Denoising auto-encoder (reconstructing full texts with noise)
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving machine translation performance with unsupervised pre-training
extraction_data.application: Machine translation, especially for low-resource languages and unsupervised settings
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

extraction_data.innovation: Large-scale multilingual denoising pre-training for machine translation, enabling zero-shot performance on low-resource languages
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multilingual parallel corpora (24 language pairs from WMT and IWSLT)
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling up multilingual pre-training for better translation quality.
extraction_data.application: Multilingual machine translation, cross-lingual transfer learning
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

extraction_data.innovation: Early version of multilingual denoising pre-training, showing some but limited generalization to unseen languages.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Limited multilingual corpus (e.g., English, Romanian, but not Arabic, German, Dutch)
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving machine translation with limited bilingual data
extraction_data.application: Machine translation, especially for low-resource languages
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

extraction_data.innovation: Improved multilingual pre-training with some unseen languages in the target pairs, showing better performance than mBART02.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multilingual corpus including English, Romanian, but not Arabic, German, Dutch
extraction_data.research_problem: Enhancing machine translation for language pairs with limited bilingual data
extraction_data.application: Machine translation for language pairs with limited training data
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
